_comment: BULLET with the paper geometry (SI): rtip = 10 nm, rbase = 250 nm, L = 12 um, h = 2 um, 5 um reservoirs and 400 nm charge rings. It is the blocker-FREE counterpart of the paper meshes. NOTE: HEAVY mesh (~22 um domain with 0.2 nm elements at the wall) — it takes a while and uses a lot of RAM. To test the workflow use geom_bullet_chico.json.
name: bullet_paper
